game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Halls of Torment: Premium:** Halls of Torment is a roguelike horde survival game where players control one of 11 distinct heroes using a virtual joystick for movement, while the character automatically attacks swarms of 70+ unique monsters. Each run lasts approximately 30 minutes, during which players collect experience to level up, choosing from 74 abilities and 1000+ traits to create synergistic builds, and picking up 68 unique items that drop from defeated enemies. The objective is to survive waves of increasingly difficult foes and defeat 35+ unique bosses, including Tormented Lords, which appear at set intervals, with the run ending if the hero's health points reach zero. Meta-progression is driven by completing over 500 quests, permanently unlocking new characters, items, and 25 blessings that enhance future runs across 6 distinct stages.
game_info.description: Battle through the Halls of Torment as a lone hero facing endless waves of monsters. Survive for 5 minutes while collecting experience orbs to level up and choose powerful abilities. Defeat enemies to gain gold and find rare items that enhance your stats. Face increasingly dangerous foes and mighty bosses that spawn at regular intervals. Your run ends if your health reaches zero, but each attempt makes you stronger.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your hero in four directions
Space: Activate special ability (when unlocked)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
ENTER: Start game from title screen
R: Return to start screen after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the player can move in all four directions without getting stuck. Verifies collision detection with world boundaries and that movement updates player position correctly in the game state.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically move in all four cardinal directions (up, down, left, right) in a pattern, testing boundary collisions. Movement will cycle through directions to ensure the player can navigate the entire playable area.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position should update smoothly in response to movement inputs. The player should be able to reach different areas of the map without passing through boundaries. Position values in gameState should reflect actual screen positions.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by implementing an optimal survival and combat strategy. Validates that the player can survive for the required duration, level up through experience collection, and successfully defeat bosses to achieve victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement intelligent kiting behavior to maintain distance from enemies while collecting experience orbs. Prioritize survival by moving away from large enemy clusters and bosses. Choose defensive and damage abilities when leveling up. Focus on gathering items and gold drops to increase power over time.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should successfully survive the full duration and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state. Player should reach multiple level-ups, collect various items, and defeat at least one boss. Final game phase should be "GAME_OVER_WIN" with a survival time of 300 seconds or more.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests ability selection and progression system. Validates that leveling up presents choices, abilities can be selected, and that selected abilities affect gameplay. Ensures the progression loop works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on collecting experience orbs aggressively to trigger level-ups quickly. When presented with ability choices, systematically select different options to test variety. Verify that chosen abilities appear in the player's ability list and affect combat.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Multiple level-ups should occur, each presenting 3 ability choices. Selected abilities should be added to player's ability roster and visible in UI. Player power should increase measurably with each ability selection.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests item collection and inventory system. Validates that items drop from enemies, can be collected by the player, and provide stat bonuses. Ensures items affect player performance and are tracked in game state.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Move toward defeated enemies to collect dropped items and gold. Prioritize areas with high enemy density to maximize drops. Track collected items in inventory and verify stat changes.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Items should drop from defeated enemies and be collectible. Player stats (damage, speed, health) should increase when items are collected. Inventory should accurately track all collected items. Gold counter should increase.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests boss encounter mechanics. Validates that bosses spawn at appropriate intervals, have distinct behavior from regular enemies, and provide greater rewards when defeated. Ensures boss fights are challenging but fair.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Survive until first boss spawn timer triggers. Use hit-and-run tactics to damage boss while avoiding its attacks. Maintain safe distance and use collected abilities effectively. Defeat boss and collect enhanced rewards.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Boss should spawn at designated time with increased health and damage. Boss should have unique visual appearance and attack patterns. Defeating boss should grant significant experience and guaranteed item drops. Player should be able to defeat boss with skilled play.
